title: Ceviche Tostada
description: A refreshing Mexican dish featuring a delicate ceviche topped with smoky spices and served on a crispy tostada.

ingredients.name: Delicate Ceviche (White Fish)
ingredients.notes: Mixed with lime juice, salt, and pepper

ingredients.name: Algerian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Cumin, coriander, and turmeric for authentic flavor

instructions: Marinate ceviche in lime juice, salt, and pepper for at least 30 minutes.
Season ground veal with Algerian spice blend and cook in a pan until browned.
Toast tortilla chips in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble tostadas with ceviche, smoky paprika, and cooked veal.
Garnish with cilantro and serve immediately.
